phases.name: Write architecture benchmark load tests
phases.reasoning: Write the test_architecture_benchmarks_load test that verifies all 5 benchmark cases load correctly with valid code, context, and expected entries. This test will initially fail (red) since no benchmark data files exist yet.

phases.name: Create all 5 architecture benchmark cases
phases.reasoning: Create all 15 files (5 directories x 3 files each) under .forge/autoresearch/benchmarks/architecture/. Cases: god-file-pipeline (3,163-line god file with 7 concerns), monolithic-database (2,400-line monolithic DB with 8 sections), tight-coupling-rusqlite (direct rusqlite dependency with no abstraction), circular-dependency (synthetic three-way circular imports), solid-violation (synthetic god function with 6 concerns). Each case needs code.rs with representative Rust code, context.md explaining the architectural context, and expected.json with must_find and must_not_flag entries. Validate all JSON files parse correctly and the test from phase 01 passes.
